description: Claude Code hooks for Small Web Apps — automated behaviors

hooks.command: pnpm run type-check 2>/dev/null && echo '✓ Type check passed' || echo '⚠️  Type check warnings — review before committing'

hooks.description: Auto-format on save (disabled by default to avoid noise)

notes: Hooks are disabled by default — enable in .claude/settings.json or via /config if desired
onBeforeCommit is most useful for catching type errors early
onPushRemote can gate unvalidated code from reaching origin
